title: Master Bundle Pages

fields.vision: A public atlas of the Master Bundle packets, showing which archives are live inputs, authority layers, handoffs, or reference materials.
fields.mechanism: It converts a large archive set into navigable project records with title, role, implementation state, source-use implications, and next action.
fields.built_components: Visible public components: 120 kept Evidence Sections, native navigation, Review Notes, source-use plan, APA lineage, and source lineage claim limit. The public package remains text-focused and does not claim unverified runtime state.
fields.source_utilization: Heuer. Loads cognitive-bias and intelligence-analysis failure modes. CIA Tradecraft Primer. Loads structured analytic technique selection and use conditions. Pherson and Pherson. Loads practical tradecraft: indicators, ACH, key assumptions, diagnosticity, and challenge procedures. Tetlock. Loads judgment calibration, forecasting humility, and expert-performance limits. Kahneman. Loads bias, heuristics, and slow/fast cognition as an error-control vocabulary. A page-family source-use record exists. Final citation strength still depends on page-specific passage review.
fields.plan: Plan: turn infrastructure evidence into plain-language project status, distinguish internal tooling from public claims, and keep every completion claim tied to a file, route, ledger, or gate. The project source notes below should be converted into authored subsections only after the page-specific claim limit and source-use decisions are settled.
fields.status: Status: native public port complete for upload and navigation; substantive source-project verification remains limited by the source lineage ceiling and the original project governance records. The page separates public presentation from project completion; completion depends on the status and remaining-gap fields.
fields.remaining_gaps: Remaining gaps: some infrastructure pages still need human-authored connective prose so a first-time reviewer can see why the machinery matters. The kept Evidence Sections below preserve project substance for close reading; final public prose should be authored from those signals rather than copied mechanically.
fields.detailed_source_vision: Master Bundle Pages is presented as a portfolio infrastructure and source-system page. Its public purpose is to show the infrastructure that lets complex projects remain governed: source memory, release state, page inventory, review workflow, and public synthesis. Source lead: The Red Team Lab is valuable when challenge, scope lock, source custody, contradiction pressure, and export discipline are visible as one governed adversarial-review machine.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from project inventory to source record, governance state, review packet, release gate, and public explanation. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.

source_derived_signals.text: The Intelligence Analysis room is valuable when regional intake, challenge methods, warning logic, scenario discipline, and release control form one evidence-to-judgment route.
The scenario registry is balanced across actor families and diversified across attack surfaces, with every DP2 packet complete in v4.
CI Cognitive Warfare advances the proof line by showing structured judgment under live adversarial ambiguity where indicators, decisions, and countermeasures must remain source-bound.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: A public atlas of the Master Bundle packets, showing which archives are live inputs, authority layers, handoffs, or reference materials.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It converts a large archive set into navigable project records with title, role, implementation state, source-use implications, and next action.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It prevents the 152-bundle corpus from becoming invisible; a reader can see what each packet is for without mistaking every archive for a finished live product.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: rendered correction table.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.summary: A public atlas of the Master Bundle packets, showing which archives are live inputs, authority layers, handoffs, or reference materials.
researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It prevents the 152-bundle corpus from becoming invisible; a reader can see what each packet is for without mistaking every archive for a finished live product.

instruments.instrument_name: Master Bundle Pages Extraction And Manifest Layer
instruments.input: files, tables, text, screenshots, source notes, and provenance markers
instruments.operation: Heuer. Loads cognitive-bias and intelligence-analysis failure modes. CIA Tradecraft Primer. Loads structured analytic technique selection and use conditions. Pherson and Pherson. Loads practical tradecraft: indicators, ACH, key assumptions, diagnosticity, and challenge procedures. Tetlock. Loads judgment calibration, forecasting humility, and expert-performance limits. Kahneman. Loads bias, heuristics, and slow/fast cognition as an error-control vocabulary. A page-family source-use record exists. Final citation.
